title: British Columbia Programme Monthly Trend Sheet - August 2025
content:
• In August 2025, credit prices in BC LCFS declined by 9.06% month-on-month (MoM), dropping from $239.04 in July to $217.39 in August - significantly lower than the March's peak of $345.09.
  • Year-to-date credit volumes for 2025 increased from 2024, by about 47%, and are currently at 1,182,736. Credit Volumes in August 2025 saw a rise by 156.22% compared to July 2025, with volumes increasing from 104,154 in July 2025 to 266,867 in August 2025. This month witnessed the highest average ticket size of 38,123.86 volume per transfer, based on 7 transfers.
  • BC LCFS has released their annual Renewable and Low Carbon Fuels Requirements Summary for 2024. Read here for further analysis.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
